scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project lamom-rules-test "vitest run --config vitest.rules.config.js"
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:build:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.cap:build:release: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
